title: Mexican Chicken Adobo Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Filipino flavors, this dish is a twist on traditional Mexican street food. The tender chicken is marinated in a mixture of soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, and chili peppers, then grilled to perfection and served in a taco shell.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine adobo mix, lime juice, garlic, chipotle peppers, cumin, and paprika. Blend until smooth.
Place the chicken breasts in a large zip-top plastic bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the chicken and massage to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes.
Shred the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the shredded chicken onto a tortilla and topping with cheese, if desired.
